metadata.title: Every Level of Hermes Agent Explained
metadata.description:
📈 ALL Systems: https://bit.ly/4kol0y5
🩵 Free Resources: https://bit.ly/3RNNDLa
🔥 Type with your voice: https://glaido.com

Hundreds of hours building Hermes agents later, there are seven levels almost nobody actually climbs. Most people get stuck at level zero without even realising it. Now, you and I are going through every single one, from a basic one-shot prompt to a fully agentic operating system that ships work whilst you sleep. So if you want to connect Claude, ChatGPT, Grok and DeepSeek into one Hermes setup that crushes admin, builds software and runs parallel sub agents, this is the breakdown. By the end, you'll know exactly where you're at and what to fix to move up.

*** CORE Software ***
☁️ Claude: https://claude.ai/
💬 ChatGPT: https://chatgpt.com/
🔀 OpenRouter: https://openrouter.ai/
🐳 DeepSeek: https://www.deepseek.com/
📁 GitHub: https://github.com/
🚀 AntiGravity: https://antigravity.google/

⌚️ Stamps:
00:00 - The Seven Levels Explained
00:55 - Level Zero And One
02:48 - Level Two: The Apprentice
04:01 - Building Your Hermes Soul
05:27 - Level Three: Commands And Skills
07:48 - Picking The Right Model
09:38 - Skills And Time Savings
11:24 - Level Four: The Integrator
13:08 - Connecting Granola And MCPs
14:45 - The MCP Candy Store Mistake
15:53 - Level Five: Orchestration
17:01 - Parallel Sub Agents In Action
18:57 - Level Six: The Builder
20:06 - Scheduled And Async Tasks
22:17 - Level Seven: Agentic Power User
23:33 - One Operating System For Everything
24:54 - Three Truths To Understand

Learn how to set up and scale a Hermes agent across all seven levels, connect Claude, ChatGPT, Grok, OpenRouter and DeepSeek for model agnostic workflows, build skills and sub agents, automate scheduled tasks, and run one agentic operating system that ships work without you.
#HermesAgent #ClaudeCode #AIAgents #ContextEngineering #AIAutomation #DeepSeek
